vehicle.label: Long-Range Surveillance Wing
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing flying-wing UAV, 2m wingspan, 4+ hour endurance

parts.label: Center Body Pod
parts.spec: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

parts.label: Wing Rib Set x 12
parts.spec: Wing rib NACA airfoil profile, lightening pockets, leading edge sock, trailing edge taper

parts.label: Elevon Servo Pocket x 2
parts.spec: Elevon servo pocket, MG90S or DS215MG, control horn linkage, removable access cover

parts.label: Motor + Pusher Prop Mount
parts.spec: Rear pusher 2814 BLDC mount, 10x7 folding prop clearance, thrust line +1deg down

parts.label: GPS + Pitot Boom
parts.spec: Nose boom 8mm, GPS at tip, pitot static port forward, BEC airflow shielded

parts.label: Camera Gimbal Bay
parts.spec: Forward downward camera gimbal bay 70mm deep, 2-axis micro gimbal, optical window

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide)
parts.spec: 4S 16000mAh Li-ion slide-in bay, CG adjust slot, top access hatch, balance lead window

parts.label: Integration Service Backbone
parts.spec: Wing/fuselage integration service backbone with assembly_datum pads, harness_raceway, service_hatch, connector_keying, anti-rotation wing datum, and visible load-path inspection marks

verify.value: All required sections are present.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment of motor mount due to manufacturing tolerances.
risk.mit: Implement precise alignment checks during assembly.

risk.desc: Cooling inlet may not provide sufficient airflow due to blockage.
risk.mit: Design cooling inlet with larger dimensions or additional vents.

risk.desc: Service access hole may be too small for necessary tools.
risk.mit: Increase the size of the service access hole.

risk.desc: Avionics pocket may not be deep enough for all equipment.
risk.mit: Increase the depth of the avionics pocket.

risk.desc: Wing spar reinforcement may not provide adequate strength.
risk.mit: Increase the dimensions of the spar reinforcement.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

physics_paths.description: Structural loads from wing transferred to motor pod
Cooling air flow from inlet to motor pod
Thermal dissipation from motor pod to wing structure
Motion of equipment bay door relative to wing structure
Atmospheric pressure to cooling inlet
Electrical and data signals from avionics to motor pod
Service access to equipment bay door

integration_opportunities.description: Mount for motor pod, bolted to wing structure
Bolts for securing motor pod to wing structure
Inlet for cooling air to motor pod
Dummy pusher prop for motor pod
Dummy motor pod for pusher prop

verify.value: All required features and geometry operations are present.

cad_brief.mass_est_g must be a numeric grams value.

verify.rule: Each physical feature must include args.at [x,y,z] and real dimensions.

verify.value: All interfaces have reciprocal connection_type, DOF, clearance_mm, and required_feature.

verify.value: Visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent for critical joints.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment during assembly due to complex interface geometry.
risk.mit: Implement detailed assembly instructions and conduct pre-assembly checks.

risk.desc: Risk of thermal expansion causing misalignment over long endurance flights.
risk.mit: Use materials with similar thermal expansion coefficients and incorporate thermal relief joints.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure at the center joint under extreme loading conditions.
risk.mit: Conduct stress analysis and reinforce the center joint with additional fasteners.

risk.desc: Risk of improper fastener installation leading to preload loss.
risk.mit: Implement torque verification and inspection procedures.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient service access for maintenance and inspection.
risk.mit: Design additional service access points and ensure they are easily accessible.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Main Spar, Ribs, Carry-Through, Fuselage Frames

physics_paths.description: Lift and landing loads transfer from wing skin to main spar, then to fuselage frames.
Thermal loads from sun exposure are dissipated through cooling airflow.
Wing flex causes motion that is constrained by the anti-rotation key.
